hero.subtext: Fun, relaxing guided acrylic painting sessions for groups of all levels. Bring your friends — leave with your own original work of art.

about.heading: Hi, I'm Patty Moore.
about.paragraph1: With over 25 years of experience teaching art, I create fun, relaxing, and inspiring painting experiences for individuals and groups of all levels.
about.paragraph2: Whether you've never painted before or already love to create, my sessions are designed to help you unwind, explore your creativity, and leave with your own original artwork. I guide each person at their own pace — helping everyone feel confident and inspired.
about.quote: No pressure. No perfection. Just creativity, joy, and the satisfaction of making something beautiful.

Finished portrait painting of a girl

reviews.quote: I hadn't painted since grade school and was so nervous — Patty made it completely stress-free. I left with a painting I'm actually proud to hang up!
reviews.name: Megan R.

reviews.quote: We booked Patty for a team afternoon and everyone loved it. So warm and encouraging, and somehow every painting came out completely different.
reviews.name: Daniel K.

reviews.quote: A perfect ladies' afternoon. Patty provides everything and guides you the whole way. We're already planning to book our next session!
reviews.name: Sofia L.

footer_tagline: Guided acrylic painting with Patty Moore · Loving art… always.
